section.heading: Severable services contracts for periods crossing fiscal years

subsection.heading: In General.—
subsection.content: The Administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration may enter into a contract for procurement of severable services for a period that begins in 1 fiscal year and ends in the next fiscal year if (without regard to any option to extend the period of the contract) the contract period does not exceed 1 year.

subsection.heading: Obligation of Funds.—
subsection.content: Funds made available for a fiscal year may be obligated for the total amount of a contract entered into under the authority of subsection (a).

section.sourceCredit: (Added Pub. L. 106–181, title VII, § 705(a), Apr. 5, 2000, 114 Stat. 157.)

note.heading: Effective Date
note.p: Section applicable only to fiscal years beginning after Sept. 30, 1999, see section 3 of Pub. L. 106–181, set out as an Effective Date of 2000 Amendments note under section 106 of this title.
